SELECT
    ID,
    NULLIF(TRIM(NAME), '') AS NAME,
    DW_BATCH_ID,
    DW_RECORD_SOURCE,
    DW_SOURCE_UPDATED_AT,
    DW_INGESTED_AT,
    DW_ROW_HASH
FROM DRAGON_DB.MUNKA_RAW.RAW_AB_PERMISSION
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ID ORDER BY DW_INGESTED_AT DESC, DW_SOURCE_UPDATED_AT DESC NULLS LAST) = 1

    APROVADA,
    USER_APROVADA_ID,
    ID_TAREFA_OLD,
    USER_ULTIMA_ATUALIZACAO_ID,
    TAREFA_PAI_ID,
    DW_BATCH_ID,
    DW_RECORD_SOURCE,
    DW_SOURCE_UPDATED_AT,
    DW_INGESTED_AT,
    DW_ROW_HASH
FROM DRAGON_DB.MUNKA_RAW.RAW_TAREFA
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ID ORDER BY DW_INGESTED_AT DESC, DW_SOURCE_UPDATED_AT DESC NULLS LAST) = 1
